(State-specific Medicaid Provider ID), then this value is the ANSI state 
numeric code (e.g., 04,17,33,48). 

If PRVDR_NUM_SYS equals “2” (NPI) or “3” (Medicare), this value is “CMS.” 

If PRVDR_NUM_SYS equals “4” (NCPDP ID) then this value is “NCPDP” 

If PRVDR_NUM_SYS equals “5” (Federal Tax ID), then this value is “IRS”. 

If PRVDR_NUM_SYS equals “6” (State Tax ID), then this value is the name of the state’s taxation 
division (e.g., DOR, OK TAX).
